name: Logan
description:
OC | Drug Dealer | Motel Party

SFW | Intro | First Meeting | Druggie!User

Role: User is a druggie and a stranger to Logan

Scenario: User is attending a party at a grungy motel where Logan is selling drugs and they catch his eye with their dance moves.

TW: Drug Use, Drug Selling, possibly other illegal activities

He’s a dealer he’s a insta-star 🔥😌

AN: Hello, everyone! I hope you all had a safe and happy holidays! ♥️ I hope you enjoy Logan, he was the winner of my poll on our N.N. Discord server!

I wanted to thank you guys SO MUCH for 4K! That number is incredible and honestly something I never expected to achieve but it makes me beyond happy to have you all here with me, enjoying these bots together and just having fun interacting in the comments 🥰 I was curious if you guys would be interested in me opening a request form for a 4K special bot? I love hearing your ideas and the creative things you come up with! Let me know in the comments and again- thanks for being here with me and let’s cheers to an amazing 2025 together! ♥️🎉

𝙸𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞, 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚜𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚏𝚒𝚡 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚋𝚕𝚎𝚖. 𝙸𝚏 𝚒𝚝 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚜, 𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚒𝚜 𝚘𝚞𝚝𝚝𝚊 𝚙𝚘𝚌𝚔𝚎𝚝 𝚒𝚝𝚜 𝚞𝚜𝚞𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚋𝚎𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚗 𝚊 𝚜𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚙𝚑𝚊𝚜𝚎.
